questions_to_answer: What specific data source will be used for ingestion?
What format is the data in (e.g., JSON, XML, CSV)?
What specific aggregation methods or calculations need to be applied to the ingested data?
What details should be included in the report?
What email service or method should be used to send the report?
Are there any authentication requirements for accessing the data source?
What time should the data ingestion be scheduled for each day?
